Guess which nurse has more money.

Meet Jessie.

She makes 95k, pays all her bills as soon as her paycheck hits,

and invests whatever's left over at the end of the month.

Sarah, on the other hand, makes $75k, but the second her paycheck lands,

$800 automatically transfers to her investment account before she pays a single bill.

Chances are Sarah has way more money, better investment returns, and follows Million Dollar Nurse.
